articles.title: Baltic Dry Index Falls to Near 1-Week Low
articles.expand: The Baltic Exchange’s dry bulk index, which measures freight rates for ships carrying dry commodities, declined for a second consecutive session on Thursday, falling 4.3% to 2,138 points—its lowest level since February 27. Larger vessel segments came under pressure amid reduced traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, reflecting disruption from the on...
articles.ai_headline: Índice de Dry Bulk del Báltico cae 4.3% a 2,138 puntos, su mínimo en casi una semana, debido a tráfico reducido en el Estrecho de Ormuz: presión sobre la economía global por disrupción en el comercio → USD alcista

articles.title: TSX Drops to 2-Week Low
articles.expand: Canada’s S P/TSX Composite Index fell about 1% on Thursday, slipping below 33,600 to a two-week low, as rising geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and signs of stubborn inflation weakened expectations for interest rate cuts. Stronger-than-anticipated wage growth and higher manufacturing costs pushed government bond yields higher in line with U...
articles.ai_headline: TSX cae 1% a mínimos de dos semanas por tensiones geopolíticas y signos de inflación persistente: expectativas de recortes de tasas se debilitan → CAD bajista

articles.title: TTF Prices Volatile on Thursday
articles.expand: European natural gas futures fluctuated around €50/MWh on Thursday, oscillating between gains and losses after an 8% decline in the previous session that followed Russian President Putin’s threat to cut off gas supplies to Europe. However, Russian pipeline deliveries to the EU have already dropped sharply in recent years and are expected to fall fu...
articles.ai_headline: Precios del gas natural europeo fluctúan alrededor de €50/MWh tras amenaza de Putin de cortar suministros: inestabilidad energética en Europa podría impulsar demanda de refugio en USD → USD alcista

articles.title: Gold Slips on Stronger Dollar and Delayed Fed Cut Bets
articles.expand: Gold reversed earlier gains to trade slightly lower near $5,115 per ounce on Thursday, as a stronger US dollar and diminished expectations for Federal Reserve interest rate cuts outweighed safe-haven demand stemming from escalating tensions in the Middle East. The conflict intensified after Israel launched a large wave of strikes on Tehran, targeti...
articles.ai_headline: Oro cae a $5,115 por onza: dólar estadounidense se fortalece y se postergan las expectativas de recortes de tasas de la Fed → USD alcista

articles.title: Brazilian Real Back on the Defensive
articles.expand: The Brazilian real weakened beyond 5.26 per US dollar, reversing its recent rebound as the relief from easing global pressures proved short-lived. The protracted escalation of conflict in the Middle East has prompted a "flight to safety" into the dollar and driven oil prices higher, raising the risk of increased fuel and fertilizer costs for Brazil...
articles.ai_headline: Real brasileño se debilita más allá de 5.26 por dólar: conflicto en Medio Oriente intensifica demanda de refugio y sube precio del petróleo → USD alcista

articles.title: Treasury Yields Rise for 4th Session
articles.expand: The yield on the US 10-year Treasury note climbed for a fourth straight session on Thursday, reaching 4.14%, its highest level in about a month, as inflation fears intensified amid the escalating conflict with Iran, with both Tehran and Washington pledging to ramp up attacks. The global bond selloff deepened as energy prices resumed their ascent af...
articles.ai_headline: Rendimiento del bono del Tesoro a 10 años sube a 4.14% en su cuarta sesión consecutiva: temores de inflación por conflicto con Irán intensifican presión vendedora en bonos → USD alcista

articles.title: US Labor Costs Rise More than Expected
articles.expand: Unit labor costs in the US nonfarm business sector increased by 2.8% in Q4 2025, exceeding market expectations of a 2% rise and following a 1.8% decline in Q3, according to preliminary estimates. The quarterly gain reflected a 5.7% increase in hourly compensation and a 2.8% rise in productivity. In the manufacturing sector, unit labor costs jumped ...
articles.ai_headline: Costos laborales en EEUU suben 2.8% en Q4 2025 superando expectativas del 2%: presión inflacionaria mantiene sesgo hawkish → USD alcista

articles.title: ECB Minutes Show Undershoot Worries Before Iran War
articles.expand: The European Central Bank said that, prior to the recent surge in energy prices linked to the Middle East conflict, policymakers had expected inflation to fall further below their 2% target. Minutes from the February 4–5 meeting show that officials were comfortable leaving interest rates unchanged and judged the overall outlook to be stable, suppor...
articles.ai_headline: Minutas del BCE de 4-5 febrero muestran preocupación por inflación por debajo del 2% objetivo antes del conflicto en Medio Oriente: expectativa de estabilidad y tasas sin cambios → EUR bajista

articles.title: US Futures Hold Muted Movements
articles.expand: US equity futures were little changed on Thursday, consolidating the prior session’s rebound as investors weighed the potential economic fallout from the war in Iran and its implications for global growth and AI infrastructure spending by leading tech firms. Futures on the three major US indexes hovered around the flatline. Refined fuel prices and ...
articles.ai_headline: Futuros de acciones en EEUU muestran movimientos moderados debido a incertidumbre sobre guerra en Irán y gasto en infraestructura de inteligencia artificial: divisa de riesgo bajo presión vendedora → NZD bajista

articles.title: BCE: Los riesgos de conflicto inclinan las perspectivas de tasas – Nordea
articles.expand: El analista jefe de Nordea, Jan von Gerich, espera que el BCE mantenga su postura por ahora mientras monitorea de cerca cómo el conflicto en Oriente Medio afecta el crecimiento y la inflación en la zona euro
articles.ai_headline: Conflicto en Oriente Medio aumenta incertidumbre sobre crecimiento e inflación en zona euro: BCE mantiene postura cautelosa → EUR bajista

articles.title: Australian Dollar Price Forecast: The 0.7150 caps the upside for now
articles.expand: Sticky domestic inflation and a Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) that isn't about to temper its hawkish attitude continue to offer an underlying cushion for the Australian Dollar (AUD), allowing for additional gains while limiting the downside.
articles.ai_headline: Inflación interna estable y RBA con actitud hawkish: nivel de 0.7150 limita el alza por ahora → AUD alcista

articles.title: USDCHF Technical Analysis: "Swissie" grinds within tight 40-Pip range
articles.expand: The USD/CHF is currently locked in a confined 40-pip trading range as the market searches for a definitive catalyst. Buyers and sellers are battling for control, with price action oscillating between key technical "swing areas." Key Technical Levels to Watch 1. The Resistance (The Ceiling): 0.7812 – 0.7821 The topside of the current range is define...
articles.ai_headline: USD/CHF en rango de 40 pips con resistencia en 0.7812-0.7821: mercado busca catalizador para romper el equilibrio → CHF neutral

articles.title: GBP/USD slumps as strong US jobs data lifts US Dollar
articles.expand: The Pound Sterling (GBP) resumes its downtrend for the week on Thursday, courtesy of heightened tensions in the Middle East and solid US employment data ahead of Friday's Nonfarm Payrolls report. At the time of writing, GBP/USD trades at 1.3337, down 0.25%.
articles.ai_headline: Datos de empleo en EEUU solidos y tensiones en Medio Oriente: GBP/USD cae 0.25% a 1.3337 → GBP bajista

articles.title: BoC: Crecimiento, energía y riesgos de recorte – TD Securities
articles.expand: Los analistas de TD Securities ven al Banco de Canadá equilibrando la incertidumbre comercial, los precios más altos del petróleo y la demanda interna. Dicen que el PIB debe crecer por encima del potencial para evitar riesgos de desinflación y recortes de tasas, y que los datos del primer trimestre serán fundamentales
articles.ai_headline: Crecimiento canadiense debe superar potencial para evitar riesgos de desinflación y recortes de tasas: datos del primer trimestre serán clave → CAD alcista

articles.title: BoC: Growth, energy and cut risks – TD Securities
articles.expand: TD Securities analysts see the Bank of Canada balancing trade uncertainty, higher Oil prices and domestic demand. They say GDP must run above potential to avoid disinflationary risks and rate cuts, and that Q1 data will be pivotal.
articles.ai_headline: Análisis de TD Securities sobre el BoC: crecimiento, energía y riesgos de recortes: PIB debe superar potencial para evitar riesgos desinflacionarios y recortes de tasas → CAD alcista

articles.title: GBP/USD: Market Not Expecting BoE Rate Cut in March
articles.expand: By Analytical Department RoboForex GBP/USD contracted to 1.3350 on Thursday, with the pound remaining under pressure and trading near three-month lows. Pressure on the dollar has eased over the past 24 hours following reports that Iran has offered to discuss terms for a potential end to the conflict. According to The New York Times, representatives...
articles.ai_headline: GBP/USD cae a 1.3350: mercado no espera recorte de tasas del BoE en marzo y debilidad del pound se mantiene cerca de mínimos de tres meses → GBP bajista

articles.title: EUR/GBP: Riesgos políticos y shock energético – Rabobank
articles.expand: La estratega senior de divisas de Rabobank, Jane Foley, destaca que la Libra esterlina ha superado recientemente al Euro, ayudada por la disminución de las expectativas de recortes de tasas del Banco de Inglaterra, aunque ninguna de las dos monedas se considera un refugio seguro.
articles.ai_headline: Disminución de expectativas de recortes de tasas del Banco de Inglaterra: libra esterlina supera al euro → EUR bajista

articles.title: EUR/GBP: Political risks and energy shock – Rabobank
articles.expand: Rabobank’s Senior FX Strategist Jane Foley highlights that the Pound has recently outperformed the Euro, helped by fading expectations of Bank of England rate cuts, even though neither currency is seen as a safe haven.
articles.ai_headline: Expectativas de recortes de tasas del BoE se desvanecen: libra se fortalece relativo al euro → EUR bajista

articles.title: EUR/USD Price Forecast: US Dollar resumes its advance on war, employment
articles.expand: The US Dollar (USD) trades with a firmer tone on Thursday, as the escalation of the Middle East war pushes investors into safety. The EUR/USD pair hovers around 1.1590, down on the day, albeit still holding within weekly limits, as the USD gains are moderated.
articles.ai_headline: Escalada del conflicto en Medio Oriente impulsa a inversores a refugios seguros: EUR/USD cae a 1.1590 → EUR bajista

articles.title: JPY: El camino del BoJ apoya un Yen japonés más firme – MUFG
articles.expand: El analista senior de divisas de MUFG, Lee Hardman, destaca que el Yen japonés se ha mantenido relativamente bien a pesar del shock en los precios de la energía, apoyado por las expectativas de que el BoJ sigue en camino de subir las tasas, potencialmente tan pronto como en abril
articles.ai_headline: Expectativas de subida de tasas del BoJ en abril: apoyo a la firmeza del yen japonés → JPY alcista

articles.title: JPY: BoJ path supports firmer Japanese Yen – MUFG
articles.expand: MUFG’s Senior Currency Analyst Lee Hardman highlights that the Japanese Yen has held up relatively well despite the energy price shock, supported by expectations that the BoJ remains on track to raise rates, potentially as soon as April.
articles.ai_headline: Expectativa de subida de tasas del BoJ en abril: apoyo a la firmeza del yen japonés → JPY alcista

articles.title: BCE: Postura cautelosa sobre el shock energético – BNY
articles.expand: Bob Savage, jefe de Estrategia Macro de Mercados de BNY, señala que los activos de la zona euro siguen siendo sensibles al shock energético impulsado por Irán, con funcionarios del BCE enfatizando la paciencia en las tasas a pesar de los precios más altos del petróleo.
articles.ai_headline: Shock energético impulsado por Irán mantiene a activos de zona euro sensibles: BCE enfatiza paciencia en tasas pese a precios altos del petróleo → EUR bajista

articles.title: El NZD/USD desciende ante las expectativas de aumento de tasas del RBNZ
articles.expand: El NZD/USD cotiza a la baja alrededor de 0.5920 el jueves al momento de escribir, bajando un 0.32% en el día, ya que el par sigue bajo presión por un Dólar estadounidense (USd) en general más firme y las expectativas cambiantes sobre la perspectiva de política monetaria de Nueva Zelanda.
articles.ai_headline: NZD/USD desciende 0.32% a 0.5920: expectativas de subida de tasas del RBNZ y dólar estadounidense firme → NZD bajista

articles.title: NZD/USD declines as stronger US Dollar, RBNZ rate outlook weigh
articles.expand: NZD/USD trades lower around 0.5920 on Thursday at the time of writing, down 0.32% on the day, as the pair remains under pressure from a broadly firmer US Dollar (USd) and shifting expectations around New Zealand’s monetary policy outlook.
articles.ai_headline: NZD/USD cae 0.32% a 0.5920: dólar estadounidense firme y expectativas de política monetaria de RBNZ pesan → NZD bajista

articles.title: USD/JPY: Tips for Beginner Traders on March 5th (US Session)
articles.expand: Trade Review and Tips for Trading the Japanese Yen The test of the 157.19 level occurred when the MACD indicator had just begun moving upward from the zero mark, confirming a correct entry point for buying the dollar. However, the pair did not develop a significant upward move. Attention should now shift to key economic indicators such as weekly in...
articles.ai_headline: USD/JPY prueba nivel 157.19 con MACD ascendente desde cero: entrada compradora del dólar no desencadena movimiento alcista significativo → JPY bajista

articles.title: GBP/USD: Tips for Beginner Traders on March 5th (US Session)
articles.expand: Trade Review and Tips for Trading the British Pound The test of the 1.3341 price level occurred when the MACD indicator had just begun moving upward from the zero mark, confirming a correct entry point for buying the pound. As a result, the pair rose by more than 20 points. However, pressure on the British pound later returned. The reason was the c...
articles.ai_headline: Test de 1.3341 con MACD ascendente desde cero: entrada compradora válida pero posterior presión vendedora → GBP mixto

articles.title: BoE: El mercado reduce drásticamente la posibilidad de recortes – ING
articles.expand: Los analistas de ING, Benjamin Schroeder y Michiel Tukker, afirman que las expectativas del Banco de Inglaterra han cambiado notablemente a medida que los mercados reevalúan los riesgos de inflación derivados de las tensiones en Oriente Medio.
articles.ai_headline: Mercado reduce expectativas de recortes del BoE: riesgos de inflación por tensiones en Oriente Medio → GBP alcista

articles.title: A friendly reminder that we do have the US non-farm payrolls tomorrow
articles.expand: The consensus is for a softer reading in the headline non-farm payrolls figure, following the strong showing in January. The first month of the year typically has seasonal factors imbued and this time, we are expected to see job gains of 59k. One known downside factor is the United Nurses Associations of California/Union of Health Care Professional...
articles.ai_headline: Empleo no agrícola en EEUU se espera en 59k para febrero: lectura suave en el mercado laboral → NZD alcista

articles.title: Encuesta DMP del BoE: Las empresas del Reino Unido anticipan una inflación en disminución y una mejora en las perspectivas de empleo
articles.expand: El Banco de Inglaterra (BoE) publicó el jueves los resultados de su encuesta del Panel de Tomadores de Decisiones (DMP) de febrero, basada en las respuestas de 2.042 directores financieros de empresas del Reino Unido recopiladas entre el 6 y el 20 de febrero.
articles.ai_headline: Encuesta DMP del BoE: empresas del Reino Unido anticipan inflación en disminución y mejora en perspectivas de empleo: optimismo económico → GBP alcista

articles.title: GBP/USD. March 5th. The market will remain under the influence of geopolitics until Friday
articles.expand: On the hourly chart, the GBP/USD pair showed a slight rise on Wednesday and consolidated above the resistance level of 1.3341–1.3352. However, on Thursday morning it reversed in favor of the US dollar and consolidated below this zone. Thus, the decline in quotes may continue today toward the support level of 1.3199–1.3214. A new consolidation above...
articles.ai_headline: GBP/USD cae por debajo de 1.3341-1.3352: declive hacia 1.3199-1.3214 → GBP bajista

articles.title: USDJPY retains the bullish bias as traders pare back Fed rate cut bets; BoJ lacks support
articles.expand: FUNDAMENTAL OVERVIEW USD: The US dollar strengthened across the board on safe haven demand this week after the US-Iran conflict erupted over the weekend. The main driver though was the market’s realisation that rate cuts might not come as soon as expected. In fact, higher oil prices will eventually put upward pressure on inflation and the US data t...
articles.ai_headline: USD se fortalece por demanda de refugio y revisión de expectativas de recortes de tasas de la Fed: presión bajista sobre el yen → JPY bajista

articles.title: USD/JPY: Simple Trading Tips for Beginner Traders on March 5. Analysis of Yesterday's Forex Trades
articles.expand: Analysis of Trades and Tips for Trading the Japanese Yen The price test at 157.19 coincided with a moment when the MACD indicator was just beginning to move above the zero mark, confirming the correct entry point for buying the dollar. However, after the pair rose by 20 pips, the upward potential was exhausted. The ADP employment data released the ...
articles.ai_headline: USD/JPY sube 20 pips desde 157.19 con MACD cruzando a positivo: potencial alcista agotado → JPY bajista

articles.title: Nikkei futures are up 3.8%
articles.expand: We are going to get a bounce in Asian stock markets today but the question is: How high. Nikkei futures are trading at 56,310 versus the close yesterday of 54,245 in the cash market. That's a healthy 3.8% rally following a 3.6% decline yesterday. I should warn that cash prices don't always follow futures and with volatility this high, there will be...
articles.ai_headline: Nikkei futures suben 3.8% a 56,310: rally en mercados asiáticos podría reducir demanda de refugio → JPY bajista

articles.title: Australian trade balance highlights a light Asia-Pacific calendar. Eyes on Korea
articles.expand: The Asia-Pacific economic calendar has only one highlight today and that's the Australian January trade balance in goods report. The consensus is a surplus of A$3.9 billion, in a solid improvement from +$3.337 billion in December. Yesterday's price action in AUD was strange as it was a laggard despite the stronger GDP number. I tend to think the dr...
articles.ai_headline: Balance comercial australiano de enero espera superávit de A$3.9 mil millones: mejora desde A$3.337 mil millones en diciembre → AUD alcista

articles.title: Swiss CPI rises 0.6% mom in February, annual inflation holds at 0.1%
articles.expand: Switzerland’s consumer prices rose more than expected in February, offering a modest sign of price pressure despite still subdued annual inflation. Data from the Federal Statistical Office showed CPI increased 0.6% mom, slightly above the expected 0.5% gain. Core CPI, which excludes fresh and seasonal products as well as energy and fuel, rose by 0....
articles.ai_headline: Inflación suiza sube 0.6% en febrero: presión moderada sobre precios → CHF alcista
